titleStmt.title: SII 7.347: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 347. (A.R. No. 154 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE HOUSE OF SUBBARAYABHATTA IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhevē . svasti śrīmaṁmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīra hariharamahārāyanu dōrasamudrada nelebīḍinoḷi[¨rdu] duṣṭanigrahaśi
ṣṭapratipālaneya māḍi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ yēkacatradiṁ rājyamaṁ
pratipālisutaṁ yiralu tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa śrīmanmahāpradhāni śrīma
llappavoḍeyaru bārakkūra rājadhāniyoḷi¨rddu tuḷuhaivekoṁkaṇarājya
ṁgaḷanu pratipālisuttaṁdina śakava¨rṣa 1309 saṁdu 10 neya va¨rttamā
na prabhavasaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍa śu 1 sōmavāradalu cauḷiyakēriya
Āyivaru samasta halaru koṁḍāḍuvaṁthā kellaṁgeṟeya vinā
yakadēvara saṁnidhiyalu Ā keṟeya mūḍaṇakaḍeya
lu beṭṭiya paraśurāmadēvanāyakara taṁmaṁdiru kāma
dēvanāyakaru Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi pratidivasavū ha
ṁneraḍu praje brāhmaṇabhōjanakkeṁdu kaṭṭista maṭhada catusī
meya vivara mūḍalu bittuva gadeya bageyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu keṟeya kaggallakaṭiya sīmeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu keṟeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu siraṁgiseṭṭiya maṭhadiṁ
daṁ nīru hariva tōḍiṁdalu teṁkalu Aṁtu maṭhada sīmebāḷi
na vivara yeḍetōḍiyalu dāḷeyāḍiyoḷage Ā bāḷina cetu
sīmeya vivara mūḍalu boṁmuvadahana gaḍiya heddāriyi
ṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu narasiṁganaṁdariya bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu bareyabaḷiya gaddeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
kubbaṭṭeya gadeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu Aṁtiṣṭaṟoḷage bayalu bettu
va nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 7 makki bittuva mu 6 Aṁtu mu 13 yi bāḷi
ṁge yikkuva gēṇi Akki mu 16 yidakke kaṭṭuṁdeṟu seṭṭiheggaḍeya va
rige mu 4 mattaṁ hāUkōlalli kōṭāḍiya bāḷu mūḍalu puru
ṣaṁṇaseṭiya bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hoḷeyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu vidyānāthadēvaṁgaḷa bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu baḍagalu puruṣaṁṇaseṭeya bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷage bayalu bittuva nāgaṁḍugada mu 5 Ādaṟa
baḍagaṇa mekki bituva nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 3 Aṁtu mu 8 yi bāḷiṁ
ge yikuva Akki gēṇi nāgaṁḍugada mu 8 yī bāḷiṁge magaUveggaḍe
ge kaṭuṁdeṟu 84 kaipāḍiyalu mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu dēvaṁṇaṁgaḷa bāḷa geḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudra
diṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kōṭayaṁṇasēnabhavana bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
teṁkalu yi catusīmeyoḷaguḷa bayalu bituva nāgaṁḍugada mū
4 hāne 4 yidake teṁginamarana gēṇivoḷagāgi dēvasvava kaḷadu śuddhavāgi
baha gēṇi Ākki mu 14 haḍahinoḷage mūḍaṇa bageyiṁdalu bittu
va gadeyiṁdalu bittuva mu 14 paḍuvaṇa bage bittuva mu 6 yida
ke nāku gaḍiyoḷageUḷa maṭhanu maneṭhāU Aṁtu bage 2
kkaṁ bituva nāgaṁḍugada mu 20 Adakuḷa Aḷavaṇadalu saha
vāgi yikuva gēṇi Aki mū 24 Aṁtu mūlada bageyiṁ
sīmeya kaḷadu baha Aki mū 60 vidyānāthadēvagaḷu taṁdu
māṟida kavilēsvarada bāḷanu ga 800 ke Aruvārava nirisida
Aḍa Ādiyāgi baha Aki mū 60 yi bāḷina hoṁnu baṁdaḍe
yi dha¨rmake hosatāgi mūlada bāḷiṁge saluUdu Aṁtu
Akiya mu 120 mūḍeyiṁdalu pratidivasa haṁneraḍu
praje brāhmarige bhōjanake naḍadubahudu . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] sāmānyō
yaṁ dha¨rmasētuṁ nrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyyō bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rvvānētānu bhāvinaḥ pā
¨rthivēṁdrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 7.347 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
